articles.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn't your typical macOS malware
articles.content: The discovery underscores the increased effort being poured into Mac infostealers.
articles.titleZh: 新发现的PamStealer不是典型的macOS恶意软件
articles.contentZh: 这一发现凸显了加大对Mac信息窃取者的投入。

articles.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
articles.content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile在诉讼中将数万台虚拟机从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: T-Mobile希望Broadcom继续支持其VMware永久许可证。

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Sony’s PlayStation disc factory is already being repurposed
articles.content: The video game disc is dead, and Sony's been planning to kill it for some time, according to a report out of Austria. The man who leads Sony's discmaking operations, Sony DADC president Dietmar Tanzer, told ORF Salzburg that the company's Thalgau plant produces 600,000 discs every day, half of which are for PlayStation. But […]
articles.titleZh: 索尼的PlayStation光盘工厂已经被重新利用
articles.contentZh: 根据奥地利的一份报告，视频游戏光盘已经死了，索尼计划杀死它已经有一段时间了。索尼DADC总裁Dietmar Tanzer告诉ORF萨尔茨堡，该公司的Thalgau工厂每天生产60万张光盘，其中一半用于PlayStation。但是[…]

articles.title: Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges over Texas crash that killed a woman inside her home
articles.content: The man whose Tesla struck and killed a woman inside her Texas home last month is now facing manslaughter charges, as reported earlier by The Wall Street Journal and local news outlet KHOU 11. 44-year-old Michael Butler was arrested on Wednesday and claimed to have been driving his Model 3 using Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD) […]
articles.titleZh: 特斯拉司机因德克萨斯州撞车事故而面临过失杀人指控，该事故导致一名妇女在家中丧生
articles.contentZh: 正如《华尔街日报》和当地新闻媒体KHOU 11早些时候报道的那样，上个月特斯拉在德克萨斯州家中撞击并杀死一名女子的男子现在面临过失杀人罪指控。44岁的迈克尔·巴特勒（ Michael Butler ）周三被捕，并声称使用特斯拉的全自动驾驶（ FSD ）驾驶他的Model 3 […]
